ast.name: log
ast.target: 字体 CSS 已保存到 %s

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to look for your custom fonts
ast.target: 用于查找自定义字体的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This button reloades from the folder you specified (it also creates the folder for you)
ast.target: 此按钮会从您指定的文件夹重新加载（它也会为您创建该文件夹）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Choose font (If you can't see your fonts, make sure your fonts are in the folder you specified and hit reload. 
				Also if you choose multiple fonts option, we will load and process all fonts in the folder for you. In that Case, enable Custom CSS Mode)
ast.target: 选择字体（如果看不到您的字体，请确保字体位于您指定的文件夹中，然后点击重新加载。另外，如果您选择多个字体选项，我们将为您加载并处理文件夹中的所有字体。在这种情况下，请启用自定义 CSS 模式）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This option should only be used if you have installed a community theme and normal mode doesn't work
ast.target: 此选项仅在您已安装社区主题且普通模式不起作用时才应使用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you want to apply a custom css style rather than default style, choose this.
ast.target: 如果您想应用自定义 CSS 样式而非默认样式，请选择此项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Input your custom css style. Use the font filename without extension (in lowercase) as the font-family name. For example, if your font file is 'MyFont.ttf', use 'myfont' in your CSS.
ast.target: 输入您的自定义 CSS 样式。使用不带扩展名的字体文件名（小写）作为 font-family 名称。例如，如果您的字体文件是 'MyFont.ttf'，请在 CSS 中使用 'myfont'。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从文件夹重新加载字体

ast.name: setText
ast.source: In Order to set the font, copy your font into fonts directory that you set
ast.target: 为了设置字体，请将您的字体复制到您设置的字体目录中
